entries.decision_or_constraint: Restarted as a fresh Hunter full-mode project after the workflow correction.
G3 must define one visual lane, component library, success frame, clarity contract, motion plan, and required design skill evidence.
The visual contract must preserve kill action, durable will write, cold successor restore, receipt, inspection, and honest degraded states.
The UI must expose workbench, kill and scope writer, cold successor restore, mutation diff, receipt, inspect, recovery, and mobile QR behavior.
G3 completion requires recorded design-taste-frontend, impeccable, and logo-generator evidence rows with real output files.
The build must prove fresh user -> action -> state change -> result artifact -> inspect/reopen/share; fallback may only be degraded/error state.
The implemented first screen must keep the split living/dead successor stage, flatline/stamp moment, scoped memory ledger, receipt proof rail, and required source markers.
Branch is BOTH; source and evidence must show AI output, Walrus/MemWal durable write/read/restore, and Sui/Walrus proof inspection.
Browser snapshot confirmed Sui Overflow 2026, Walrus headline partner, tracks including Special - Walrus, active dates, submit project affordance, and participant handbook/resource links.
Public smoke must use a fresh visitor path, state change, inspect/reopen/share result, mobile viewport, screenshots, console/network checks, and deployed URL proof.

README and submission copy must tell user -> action -> result -> inspection path; deck requires ppt-master in the current skill list; final video requires HyperFrames, measured TTS, and real app recording.
Submission form work must stop before final Submit for human confirmation; paste only known fields and keep strong claims backed by runtime/report/source proof.
